title: Growth Beyond Salvation
refs: Psalm 1 Proverbs 4 Matthew 5 John 15 Romans 8 Galatians 5 Ephesians 5 Joshua 1 John 17 Romans 12 2 Timothy 3 Hebrews 4 1 Peter 2 1 John 1:9 James 2 Psalm 32 Ephesians 2 Titus 2 1 Corinthians 3 2 Corinthians 5 Romans 14 Revelation 22 Romans 8:29 Galatians 4 Philippians 3 Hebrews 6 2 Peter 1 1 John 3
snippet: Six phases from the new birth through Christlikeness — the call to press on, Spirit-filling, the Word as instrument, restoration of righteousness through confession and cleansing, the Bema and rewards, and conformity to Christ.
text: Growth Beyond Salvation. Salvation is the door not the destination. The call to press on. Spirit filling and empowerment. The Word as the instrument of growth. Restoration of righteousness and the works of a living faith. Rewards and the Bema. Conformed to Christ.

title: The Royal Priest
refs: Hebrews 5:5-6 Hebrews 6:17-20 Hebrews 7:1-3 Hebrews 7:24-25 1 Peter 2:5 1 Peter 2:9 Revelation 1:6 Hebrews 7:26-28 Revelation 5:9-10 Romans 5:2 Hebrews 4:14-16 Hebrews 10:19-22 Romans 12:1 Hebrews 13:15-16 Revelation 20:6 2 Timothy 2:12
snippet: The invisible commission — your permanent priestly standing before God, direct access to the throne, the offerings the priest brings, and the eternal priesthood that reigns in the Kingdom.
text: The Royal Priest. What Christ has made you and what to do with it. The priestly order of Melchizedek. Union with Christ confers the royal priesthood. Universal declaration over every Church Age believer. Boldness of access to the throne of grace. Offerings the priest brings living sacrifice praise and doctrine. Eternal priesthood and the Kingdom reign. Priests of God and of Christ reigning with him a thousand years.

title: The Royal Ambassador
refs: Hebrews 1:1-3 John 20:21 2 Corinthians 5:20 Ephesians 6:20 Philemon 9 1 Corinthians 2:16 Philippians 3:20 2 Corinthians 5:18-19 Philippians 4:19 2 Corinthians 9:8 2 Corinthians 12:9 1 Peter 2:9 Romans 12:11 Colossians 3:17 2 Corinthians 5:15 1 Thessalonians 4:16-17 2 Thessalonians 2:6-8 Revelation 19:11-16 Revelation 5:10
snippet: The outward commission — representing the King of kings to a world that rejected Him. Appointed by God, sustained by His supply, operating by His written Word, until the recall at the Rapture closes the embassy.
text: The Royal Ambassador. Christ the original ambassador. The Father sent the Son the Son sends the believer. God appoints not the believer. Ambassador in chains. Written instructions the mind of Christ. Citizenship in heaven. The King supplies everything. Full-time service every believer everywhere. The Rapture as recall of the ambassadors. The Tribulation follows. The Kingdom is the convergence of both commissions.

title: Kingdom Reality
refs: Luke 17:20-21 Colossians 1:13 Romans 14:17 Matthew 13:44 Matthew 13:45-46 Colossians 1:19-20 John 12:31 Ephesians 1:13-14 1 Corinthians 6:19-20 Romans 8:9-11 John 16:11 Ephesians 6:12 1 John 5:19 Daniel 2:44 Revelation 11:15 Luke 19:11-13 Ephesians 1:14 Revelation 5:9-10 Revelation 21:3-5 Isaiah 11:6-9
snippet: The territory purchased by the blood of Christ — already transferred, already inhabited, contested but certain. The Kingdom is not within you, not something you build, and not merely future. It is the present operational reality of every believer.
text: Kingdom Reality. The kingdom is already present. Entós in the midst of you not within you. Transferred into the kingdom at salvation. The purchase price at the cross. Matthew 13 Christ as the buyer not the believer. The field is the cosmos. The pearl is the Church. Spirit within the kingdom around. Arrabón down payment of full inheritance. Operating in contested territory. Convicted enemy taking prisoners. The kingdom is not what you build it is what you inhabit. Kingdom coming in full. Eden restored. All things new.

title: Faith
refs: Ephesians 2:8-9 Romans 12:3 John 6:44 2 Peter 1:1 Romans 10:17 1 Corinthians 15:1-4 John 3:16 Acts 16:31 John 6:37 Romans 10:9-10 Luke 23:42-43 Hebrews 11:1 Hebrews 11:6 Galatians 2:20 2 Corinthians 5:7 Jude 3 Colossians 2:6-7 1 Timothy 4:1 Psalm 119:11 Matthew 8:26 Matthew 17:20 Matthew 9:20-22 Hebrews 12:1-2
snippet: Faith is a gift assigned by God, activated by the Gospel, and expressed in the affirmative response of the will to God's exclusive claim on human destiny — active, passive, and always directed toward Christ as its object.
text: Faith. Faith as gift assigned in measure. The draw of the Father. John 6:44. Gospel as the call. Faith comes by hearing. Positive volition as the saving response. The double negative promise of John 6:37. Active faith the principle that moves. Knowledge belief trust in sequence. Hebrews 11 assurance and conviction. Passive faith the doctrine deposited in the kardia. Jude 3 the faith once delivered. The darkened heart and the measure released. Little faith rebuked versus commended. The mustard seed unobstructed. Hebrews 12 lay aside every weight.

title: The God-Ordered Life
refs: Proverbs 16:9 Jeremiah 29:11 Ephesians 2:10 Philippians 1:6
snippet: Man chooses to walk. God plans the steps. An introduction to the curriculum — the three-act shape of a life ordered by God, commanded and arranged toward an eternal assignment.
text: The God-Ordered Life. Introduction. Ordered meaning commanded. Ordered meaning arranged. Man chooses to walk God plans the steps. Metanoia as the operating principle. Three acts of the God-ordered life. First third thinking we are something. Second third knowing we are nothing. Third third God making something out of nothing. The covenant stated not negotiated. Royal priest royal ambassador Kingdom reality. The Holy Spirit is the teacher the Word is the curriculum.

title: Repentance
refs: 2 Corinthians 7:10-11 Romans 12:2 Acts 17:30 Acts 20:21 Luke 15:17-18 Mark 1:15 Ephesians 4:22-24 Philippians 4:8 Colossians 3:2 1 John 1:9 Ephesians 5:18 Hebrews 4:1-3 Romans 5:3-4 Matthew 3:8 Acts 26:20 1 Corinthians 2:16 Romans 8:29 Revelation 20:6 Philippians 2:5
snippet: μετάνοια — a change of mind. Not an emotional performance. Not a works program. The continuous operating principle of the Christian life, applied to sin through confession, to control through the Spirit-filled life, and to every domain where the old framework still operates.
text: Repentance. Metanoia a change of mind. Latin freight of poenitere stripped. Godly sorrow is the catalyst not the repentance. Renewal of the mind Romans 12:2. Repentance at salvation who God is who man is what man needs. Prodigal son came to himself in the pigpen. Repentance as continuous operating principle. Confession 1 John 1:9 agreeing with God about sin. Spirit-filled life Ephesians 5:18 repentance applied to control. Trusting God over circumstances. Fruit of genuine repentance 2 Corinthians 7:11 seven marks. Mind of Christ as the telos of metanoia. Reigning with Christ the destination of the repentant mind.

title: Election
refs: Romans 3:25-26 Isaiah 46:9-10 Genesis 15:6 1 Peter 1:1-2 Matthew 22:9-10 Matthew 22:14 2 Peter 3:9 Exodus 4:21 Exodus 8:15 Romans 9:17-18 Romans 8:28 Romans 9:10-13 Matthew 1:5-6 2 Samuel 12:24 Luke 1:30-31 1 Corinthians 1:27-29 Romans 2:28-29 Romans 9:30-32 John 8:39-40 Galatians 3:28-29 Revelation 5:9 Romans 8:29-30 Revelation 22:17 2 Timothy 2:10
snippet: An invitation from eternity past — extended to all, received by choice. God has a decree. Jesus controls history. The Spirit guides to all truth but does not guide all to truth. Each individual chooses how closely to follow.
text: Election. Invitation from eternity past. Integrity of God. Righteousness demands justice executes grace is always the policy. Just and the justifier simultaneously. Abraham credited faith as righteousness foreknowledge basis. Election as invitation extended to all. Foreknowledge not arbitrary selection. Wedding feast highways and byways. Pharaoh principle negative volition confirmed and leveraged. Romans 9 rightly read. Reversal pattern Jacob Esau Rahab Ruth Nathan Mary. God inverts human expectation. Anti-weaponization principle. Circumcision Torah Abrahamic descent dismantled. Letter subverts spirit. Galatians 3 all one in Christ. Long arc completed. Golden chain Romans 8. Last invitation Revelation 22 Come.

title: Grace and Love — Part 1
refs: Matthew 5:45 Genesis 7:11-12 1 Peter 3:20-21 2 Peter 3:5-6 Ephesians 1:18 2 Corinthians 3:14-16 1 Corinthians 2:14 John 3:16-17 John 3:19-21 Romans 5:8 John 3:3-6 John 3:7-8 John 6:44 John 1:12-13 Romans 8:10 Isaiah 40:2 2 Corinthians 5:17 Ephesians 2:8-9 Romans 11:6 Titus 3:5
snippet: Common grace and the new birth — the rain that falls on all, the veil that thins, the Spirit that steps in. Double imputation at the threshold. John 3, Nicodemus. The plan flows from the integrity of God.
text: Grace and Love Part 1. Common grace impersonal love always to the unbeliever. Grace is God's policy all He is free to do on basis of finished work of Christ. Integrity of God no weak links no human merit. Water as irreplaceable image of grace. First rain judgment and salvation same water. Noah ark common grace mirage becomes real water at positive volition. The veil Ephesians 1:18 eyes of the heart. Human IQ no substitute. Nicodemus night meeting born of water and Spirit. Wind blows where it wills. John 3:16 impersonal love toward hostile world. Double imputation life and righteousness simultaneously. Isaiah 40:2 double for all her sins. New creation.

title: Grace and Love — Part 2
refs: John 4:4-7 Romans 5:10 John 4:10 John 4:13-14 John 7:38-39 Ephesians 1:13-14 John 4:16-18 Romans 8:38-39 Psalm 139:1-4 John 4:23-24 Romans 12:1 1 Peter 2:9 Romans 8:32 2 Peter 1:3 Ephesians 3:16-17 John 4:28-30 John 7:38 John 4:39-42
snippet: Efficacious grace and personal love — always to the believer. The detour through Samaria. The living water that becomes a permanent interior spring. One drink becomes rivers. John 4, the Samaritan woman.
text: Grace and Love Part 2. Efficacious grace personal love always to the believer. Royal family of God adopted redeemed heirs. Grace pipeline inviolable shielded from Satan world flesh. He had to pass through Samaria sovereign appointment ede. Living water permanent interior spring. Never thirst again. Sealed with Spirit arrabón down payment. Go call your husband personal love knows your name. Completely known completely loved. Worship in spirit and truth. Priestly function of the reconciled. Father seeks true worshipers. Grace pipeline from Father through imputed righteousness to indwelling Spirit. Left her water jar one drink becomes rivers. The whole city came out.

title: Confession
refs: Matthew 6:6 Philippians 2:5-8 1 John 1:9 Psalm 32:3-4 Romans 2:1 Proverbs 28:13 Psalm 51:16-17 Luke 9:23 1 Corinthians 1:27-29 Hebrews 4:15-16 1 Corinthians 11:31 Philippians 4:6-7 Psalm 32:5 Genesis 3:9-13 Genesis 3:15 Genesis 3:21 Genesis 3:8 John 1:14 1 John 1:9
snippet: Not a transaction — the approach to the throne. The pipeline is inviolable. Fellowship is the flow. Confession restores it. The known sins forgiven. The forgotten sins cleansed. The first approach was in a garden.
text: Confession. Not transaction not guilt management. Withdrawal of false attribution. Private priesthood. Pipeline inviolable shielded purchased by blood. Sin interrupts the filling confession restores it. Carnal or spiritual mutually exclusive states. Self-serving narrative pride arrogance hatred complex. Broken spirit broken contrite heart. Humbling judging self not others peace of assurance. Known sins forgiven unknown sins cleansed. Approach to the throne prayer praise study proclamation. Not being filled with the Spirit and going on living a Christian life quenches the Spirit. A believer not living a Christian life at all grieves the Spirit. Garden Genesis 3 first approach. Adam vindicated complete record no deflection. Protoevangelion. First blood first covering His choosing. Lord walking in garden incarnation second walking among sinful men. System never changed 1 John 1:9 confirmation not innovation.

title: The Filling of the Holy Spirit
refs: 1 Samuel 16:14 Psalm 51:11 Numbers 11:25 Acts 2:1-4 John 14:16-17 Ephesians 1:13-14 Isaiah 61:1 Luke 4:18 Luke 4:1 Acts 10:38 John 20:22 Ephesians 5:18 1 Corinthians 2:12-14 John 16:13 Ephesians 5:19-20 Colossians 3:16-17 Romans 8:26-27 Galatians 5:22-25 2 Corinthians 3:17-18 1 Corinthians 6:19-20
snippet: The one revocable ministry. Before Pentecost the Spirit was given and withdrawn. After the cross — permanent indwelling inaugurated. Jesus lived the prototype life in the Spirit. He cut the path. Then He gave it to us.
text: Filling of the Holy Spirit. Five ministries indwelling baptism sealing gifts filling. Four irrevocable one revocable. Before Pentecost Spirit given and withdrawn. Saul lost Spirit consulting necromancer. David prayed take not Holy Spirit from me. Prophets received Spirit for commission. Pentecost permanent indwelling inaugurated. Cross completed Son crowned name above every name Spirit poured out. Jesus prototype life Spirit operating environment. Isaiah 61 Luke 4 full of Holy Spirit. Acts 10:38 God anointed Jesus with Holy Spirit and power. He made it lived it first and best cut the path gave it to us. Carnal or spiritual mutually exclusive. Be filled present passive imperative continuously. Not being filled and going on living Christian life quenches Spirit. Believer not living Christian life grieves Spirit. Confession only mechanism restores filling. Pastor-teacher deposits doctrine left lobe Holy Spirit transfers right lobe metabolization. Natural mind stands down at hand-off point. John 16:13 Spirit guides into all truth. Temple sacrifice confession presence filling prayer praise hymns petition thanksgiving. Progressive sanctification begins with knowledge of filling. Glorify Christ in members unique spiritual life Church Age.

title: The Bread of Life
refs: 1 Peter 2:2 Matthew 18:3 Deuteronomy 8:3 Hebrews 5:12-14 1 Corinthians 3:1-3 Ephesians 4:18 John 6:27 James 1:22-25 Romans 7:15 John 6:53-56 John 6:63 John 6:66-67 John 6:68-69 Hebrews 5:14 Colossians 1:9-10 John 17:3 Galatians 4:9 John 6:35
snippet: Doctrine as the food that grows the soul toward maturity. Alienation from the spiritual life is not produced by sin but by ignorance of doctrine. Infancy, adolescence, maturity — all operating under the grace provision of the Holy Spirit.
text: Bread of Life doctrine food soul maturity. Alienation spiritual life ignorance doctrine not sin. Without doctrine believer cannot execute spiritual life. Infancy learning will of God. Child posture teachability. 1 Peter 2:2 pure milk Word. Matthew 18:3 become like children. Deuteronomy 8:3 man does not live by bread alone. Arrested infancy danger soul never fed. Hebrews 5 ought to be teachers still need milk. Corinthians carnal believers flesh not spiritual. Adolescence transition knowing without doing. John 6:27 labor for food that endures. James 1:22 doers not hearers only. Romans 7:15 do not do what I want. Hard saying John 6:53 eat flesh drink blood. Spirit gives life flesh profits nothing words are spirit and life. Many disciples turned back walked away. Maturity executing spiritual life. Peter to whom shall we go words of eternal life. Problem-solving devices operational spiritual gifts deployed. Powers of discernment trained by constant practice. This is eternal life knowing God and being known by God. John 17:3 eternal life knowing the only true God. Galatians 4:9 known by God. John 6:35 bread of life shall not hunger shall never thirst. All stages under grace provision Holy Spirit metabolization.

title: The Integrity of God
refs: Deuteronomy 4:39 Isaiah 46:10 Colossians 1:15-17 Hebrews 13:8 Malachi 3:6 Lamentations 3:22-23 Psalm 139:4 Job 37:16 Romans 11:33 Isaiah 40:26 2 Peter 1:3 Psalm 139:7-10 Hebrews 13:5 John 17:17 John 14:6 John 16:13 Exodus 3:14 John 3:36 Romans 6:23 1 John 4:8 Psalm 89:14 John 3:16 Romans 5:8 1 Chronicles 16:34 Romans 3:21-22 2 Corinthians 5:21 Romans 3:25-26 1 John 1:9 Deuteronomy 32:4
snippet: Ten attributes, one uncompromised character. The incommunicable foundation, the hinge of Veracity and Eternal Life, and the communicable attributes. Justice is the point of contact. Love is the eternal motivation. Righteousness and justice are the guardians of His integrity.
text: Integrity of God ten attributes one uncompromised character. Sovereignty supreme ruler absolute will authority volition free will coexist. Immutability unchangeable no variation shifting shadow faithfulness from immutability. Omniscience all-knowing simultaneously perfect eternal knowledge wisdom. Omnipotence all-powerful unlimited self-restricted by own integrity nothing impossible. Omnipresence entirely present everywhere believer never alone. Veracity absolute truth hinge attribute God knowable Word is truth Spirit of truth guides into all truth. Eternal life self-existing I AM timeless life imputed believers Romans 6:23 gift of God. Love eternal motivation requires no object God is love impersonal personal love. Justice point of contact fallen creature guardians of integrity righteousness principle justice function. Righteousness inviolable standard root center essence imputed at salvation 2 Corinthians 5:21. Justice executes what righteousness demands cross propitiation just and justifier simultaneously. Confession adjustment to justice of God 1 John 1:9 faithful and just. All ten operating simultaneously no compromise cross fullest expression divine integrity.

title: Faith-Rest
refs: 1 Corinthians 3:9-11 Ephesians 2:19-22 Matthew 11:28-30 Hebrews 3:7-11 Exodus 17:2-3 Romans 8:32 Hebrews 4:1-3 Hebrews 4:9-11 Lamentations 3:22-23 John 6:32-35 John 6:63 Matthew 6:11 Deuteronomy 8:3 Hebrews 4:12 Isaiah 40:31 Hebrews 4:14-16 Philippians 4:6-7 1 Peter 1:7-8
snippet: The third problem-solving device. Building a temple not a prison. Cleansed by the blood, fed by the Word, resting in the promises. The three-step drill — claim the promise, apply the rationale, reach the conclusion. The rest remains.
text: Faith-rest third problem-solving device edification complex temple not prison. Faith pistis nonmeritorious compatible grace merit in object. Faith perception gnosis to epignosis Holy Spirit transfers left lobe to right lobe. Meribah wilderness generation warning hit panic button. Hebrews 3 today if you hear his voice harden not your hearts. Forty years daily manna provision available would not trust. Rest remains Hebrews 4 promise not exhausted by failure. Message not mixed with faith did not benefit them. Grain in warehouse seven thousand promises. Manna daily new every morning Lamentations 3:22-23 great is your faithfulness. True bread from heaven John 6 flesh of Christ doctrine metabolized by Spirit. Words are spirit and life. Daily bread Matthew 6:11 Deuteronomy 8:3 every word from mouth of God. Three-step drill claim promise apply doctrinal rationale reach conclusion. Essence of God rationale logistical grace rationale plan of God rationale. Isaiah 40:31 exchange human strength for divine strength. Cleansed by blood confession adjustment to justice of God. Fed by Word filling restored. Resting in promises throne of grace confidence Hebrews 4:16. Peace of God guards heart and mind Philippians 4:7. Temple functional spiritual life as God designed.

title: Adam's Original Sin
refs: Genesis 2:7 Genesis 2:16-17 Genesis 1:26-27 Genesis 3:6-7 Romans 5:12 Romans 6:6 Romans 5:19 1 Corinthians 15:21-22 Romans 5:15-17 Psalm 51:5 Ephesians 2:1-3 John 3:6 Luke 1:35 2 Corinthians 5:21 Hebrews 4:15 Romans 5:18-19 Romans 3:23-24 John 5:24
snippet: The fall, the federal headship, and the condition every human being is born into. Spiritually dead before the first personal sin. The virgin birth as the one exception. The double imputation at the new birth — the solution larger than the problem.
text: Adam original sin fall federal headship. Created spiritually alive body soul human spirit. One prohibition volition cognitive disobedience. Spiritual death immediate human spirit lost sin nature formed. Transmitted genetically through male procreation. Romans 5:12 sin entered world through one man death spread to all. Federal headship representative head entire human race. Symmetry Christ headship solves what Adam's headship produced. Double imputation physical birth soul life Adam's sin simultaneously. Spiritually dead before first personal sin. Psalm 51:5 brought forth in iniquity. Ephesians 2:1 dead in trespasses by nature children of wrath. Virgin birth one exception no human father no sin nature transmitted. Impeccable humanity of Christ qualified as substitute. 2 Corinthians 5:21 made him to be sin who knew no sin. New birth double imputation human spirit divine righteousness simultaneously. Justification Romans 3:23-24 justified by grace as gift. John 5:24 passed from death to life. Grace abounds much more than trespass.

title: The Sin Nature
refs: Romans 7:18 Galatians 5:17 Romans 6:12-13 Matthew 26:41 Galatians 5:19-21 Romans 7:8 Isaiah 64:6 Hebrews 6:1 1 Corinthians 3:12-13 Matthew 23:25-28 Romans 6:12-14 Galatians 5:13 Ephesians 4:22 James 1:14-15 1 John 2:16 Galatians 5:16 Galatians 5:22-24 Romans 8:4-6
snippet: The enemy inside the wire. Area of weakness produces personal sin. Area of strength produces human good and dead works. Trend toward legalism, trend toward antinomianism. Lust pattern drives both. One mechanism displaces it — walking by the Spirit.
text: Sin nature enemy inside the wire architecture operation. Present believer physical birth to death cell structure body. Cannot be removed improved overcome by flesh. Area of weakness source personal sin. Area of strength source human good dead works. Trend legalism self-righteousness morality works ritual approbation. Trend antinomianism self-gratification disregards authority morality restraint. Lust pattern insatiable engine drives both trends. Power lust approbation lust pleasure lust social lust sexual lust chemical lust crusader lust monetary lust revenge lust criminal lust. Romans 7:18 nothing good dwells in flesh. Galatians 5:17 flesh and Spirit opposed mutually exclusive. Isaiah 64:6 righteous deeds filthy rags. Hebrews 6:1 repentance from dead works. Bema evaluation Corinthians gold silver precious stones wood hay straw burned. Matthew 23 Pharisees whitewashed tombs legalism trend. Galatians 5:16 walk by Spirit will not gratify desires of flesh. Fruit of Spirit displaces works of flesh. Filling displaces sin nature from operational control.

title: Personal Sin and Divine Discipline
refs: Matthew 5:21-22 Matthew 5:27-28 Proverbs 23:7 2 Corinthians 10:5 James 3:5-6 Matthew 12:36-37 Ephesians 4:29 Galatians 5:19-21 James 1:15 1 John 3:4 Hebrews 12:5-6 Hebrews 12:10-11 Matthew 7:1-2 Romans 2:1 James 4:11-12 1 John 1:9 Psalm 32:5 Hebrews 12:12-13
snippet: Three categories of personal sin — mental, verbal, overt. Three stages of divine discipline — warning, intensive, dying. Triple compound for judging others. The recovery closes the loop. Faithful and just to forgive. Faithful and just to cleanse.
text: Personal sin divine discipline three categories mental verbal overt. Sin nature provides temptation individual provides decision volition. Mental attitude sins where every sin begins. Hatred arrogance jealousy bitterness envy worry fear lust covetousness vindictiveness. Matthew 5 adultery in heart murder in heart interior standard. Verbal sins interior made audible gossip slander maligning judging lying. James 3 tongue fire world unrighteousness. Triple compound discipline verbal sins judging others threefold punishment. Matthew 7:1-2 with measure you judge you will be judged. Romans 2:1 you condemn yourself you who judge. Overt sins interior made visible sexual immorality theft violence drunkenness. Divine discipline corrective grace not anger. Hebrews 12 Lord disciplines those he loves. Warning discipline intensive discipline dying discipline sin unto death. Three stages escalation love will not abandon. Recovery confession 1 John 1:9 faithful and just forgive cleanse. Known sins forgiven forgotten sins cleansed. Filling restored grace pipeline open priest at throne. Psalm 32:5 I acknowledged I did not cover you forgave. Loop opened in Adam closed at cross every confession.

title: Reversionism
refs: 1 Timothy 6:3-4 2 Timothy 3:4 Ecclesiastes 2:10-11 Proverbs 13:15 Hosea 8:7 2 Corinthians 6:11-12 Philippians 3:18-19 2 Peter 2:20-21 Hebrews 3:13 Ephesians 4:17-18 1 Timothy 4:1 Ephesians 4:18-19 Psalm 95:7-10 Jeremiah 9:13-14 Revelation 2:4-5 1 John 1:9 2 Samuel 12:13 Lamentations 3:40
snippet: Eight stages of regression — reaction, frantic search, boomerang, emotional revolt, locked-in negative volition, blackout of the soul, scar tissue, reverse-process reversionism. The exit ramp available at every stage.
text: Reversionism eight stages progressive regression. Believer turns away from God's plan returns to former lifestyle indistinguishable from unbeliever. Saved not lost. Temporal consequences worse than unbeliever. Stage 1 reaction distraction disillusionment hypersensitivity rejects Word authority. Stage 2 frantic search for happiness futile pursuit outside filling. Stage 3 operation boomerang backfires discouragement depression rage. Stage 4 emotional revolt soul emotion assumes control dictates to right lobe instability mood swings irrationality doctrine neutralized. Stage 5 locked-in negative volition complete rejection Word grace provisions hardened. Stage 6 blackout of the soul doctrinal void vacuum draws in satanic propaganda false doctrine darkened understanding. Stage 7 scar tissue soul evil ideas accumulate right lobe hardness of heart truth stops circulating degeneracy indistinguishable from unbeliever. Stage 8 reverse-process reversionism total influence evil substitutes Satan's plan for God's plan pseudolove fanaticism. Exit ramp available every stage. Recovery confession 1 John 1:9 restored filling return to Word. David recovered. Remember from where you have fallen repent do works you did at first.

title: The Seven Imputations
refs: Genesis 2:7 Romans 5:12 1 Peter 2:24 2 Corinthians 5:21 Isaiah 53:5-6 Romans 4:3-5 Romans 3:24 Philippians 3:9 John 3:36 1 John 5:11-12 Romans 6:23 Ephesians 1:3 Proverbs 8:18 1 Corinthians 2:9 2 Corinthians 5:10 Ephesians 2:7 2 Timothy 4:7-8
snippet: God's complete plan from physical birth to eternity. Seven imputations — two at birth, one at the cross, two at salvation, two in maturity and eternity. Real and judicial. The grace abounds much more than the trespass.
text: Seven imputations God's complete plan humanity birth to eternity. Real imputation affinity between what given and receiver. Judicial imputation no affinity source is justice of God. Imputation 1 soul life to biological life real blessing physical birth person exists. Imputation 2 Adam's original sin to sin nature real cursing same moment spiritual death condemnation. Imputation 3 mankind's sins to Christ judicial cursing cross penalty executed righteousness satisfied barrier removed. Imputation 4 divine righteousness to believer judicial blessing salvation justification acceptable to divine standard. Imputation 5 eternal life to believer real blessing salvation human spirit created receives eternal life regeneration. Imputation 6 blessings in time to mature believer real blessing advance develops capacity every spiritual blessing Ephesians 1:3. Imputation 7 blessings in eternity winner believer real blessing Bema evaluation resurrection body eternal rewards immeasurable riches Ephesians 2:7. Double imputation physical birth reversed by double imputation new birth. Grace abounds much more than trespass. Plan complete before foundation of world executed without compromise to single attribute.

title: Grace Orientation
refs: Matthew 11:28-30 Ephesians 2:8-9 Philippians 3:4-8 Galatians 2:21 Romans 11:6 Romans 5:1-2 Hebrews 4:16 Romans 8:1 Romans 7:24-25 Romans 8:37 1 Corinthians 15:10 Romans 15:7 Ephesians 4:32 Romans 2:1 Romans 4:20-21 Philippians 4:11-13 2 Corinthians 12:9-10
snippet: The fourth problem-solving device. Come to Him as children and learn. The merit system dismantled. Grace toward God, toward self, toward others as the operating system. My grace is sufficient for you.
text: Grace Orientation fourth problem-solving device. Merit system dismantled grace God's policy not mood. Come to me as children learn Matthew 11:28-30 yoke easy burden light rest. Not your own doing gift of God Ephesians 2:8-9. Paul's resume Philippians 3 blameless counted as loss for Christ. Galatians 2:21 if righteousness through law Christ died for no purpose. Romans 11:6 grace no longer on basis of works. Grace toward God imputed righteousness not performance Romans 5:1-2 standing fixed grace flowing. Hebrews 4:16 confidence to throne of grace. Romans 8:1 no condemnation in Christ Jesus. Grace toward self wretched man more than conqueror Romans 7-8 held together. By grace of God I am what I am 1 Corinthians 15:10. Grace toward others Romans 15:7 welcome as Christ welcomed you. Ephesians 4:32 forgiving as God in Christ forgave you. Romans 2:1 you who judge condemn yourself. Grace as operating system Romans 4:20-21 Abraham fully convinced. Philippians 4:11-13 learned contentment. 2 Corinthians 12:9-10 my grace is sufficient power made perfect in weakness.

title: Logistical Grace
refs: Romans 8:32 Lamentations 3:22-23 Matthew 6:25-33 Philippians 4:19 Psalm 37:25 Psalm 68:19-20 Proverbs 3:5-6 Isaiah 41:10 2 Corinthians 1:3-4 Job 5:22-24 Romans 8:35-37 Isaiah 30:18 Romans 8:28 Hebrews 13:5-6 2 Peter 1:3
snippet: God's daily provision for every believer regardless of spiritual condition. Not because the believer deserves it — because the Shepherd keeps on shepherding. New every morning. Great is your faithfulness.
text: Logistical grace God's daily provision every believer regardless spiritual condition. From salvation to physical death or Rapture. Air food shelter clothing income transportation guardian angels divine establishment canon Scripture Holy Spirit pastor-teacher. Not because believer deserves it because Shepherd keeps on shepherding. Romans 8:32 did not spare Son how will He not graciously give all things. Lamentations 3:22-23 steadfast love never ceases mercies new every morning great is your faithfulness. Matthew 6:25-33 do not be anxious seek first kingdom all these things added. Philippians 4:19 God shall supply every need according to riches in glory. He leads sovereign direction Proverbs 3:5-6. Valley logistical grace under suffering Isaiah 41:10 I will uphold you. 2 Corinthians 1:3-4 God of all comfort comfort others. Table prepared in presence of enemies Romans 8:35-37 more than conquerors. Isaiah 30:18 LORD waits to be gracious. Romans 8:28 all things work together for good. Hebrews 13:5-6 never leave nor forsake. Surely goodness and mercy shall follow all the days of my life.

title: Salvation Theology
refs: Romans 3:23-26 2 Corinthians 5:21 Romans 3:25 1 John 2:2 Hebrews 2:17 Colossians 2:13-14 Isaiah 43:25 Isaiah 44:22 Hebrews 9:26-28 Hebrews 10:10-14 Acts 20:28 Acts 2:38 1 Timothy 2:5 Hebrews 10:19-22 1 Peter 2:9 Revelation 1:5-6
snippet: Propitiation and expiation — one facing God, one facing man. ἱλαστήριον. ἐφάπαξ — once for all, He sat down. The Latin did more harm to the Greek than the Greek will ever do to the man who reads it. The warrant of the individual priesthood.
text: Salvation theology propitiation expiation two distinct transactions simultaneously. Propitiation Godward satisfaction divine integrity hilastarion mercy seat Romans 3:25. Wrath of God against sin fully absorbed by substitute. Dodd RSV contested translation expiation removes wrath removes need for substitute. Expiation manward removal of sin record cancelled debt nailed to cross Colossians 2:13-14. Isaiah 43:25 blotted out like cloud. Once for all ephapax Hebrews 9:26-28 appeared once to put away sin. He sat down Hebrews 10:10-14 Levitical priests never sat down work never finished. Christ sat down work finished no re-presentation no supplement. Latin did more harm to Greek than Greek will do to man who reads it. Metanoia not poenitentiam. Presbuteros not sacerdos. Eis mesites one mediator 1 Timothy 2:5. Veil torn from top to bottom. Warrant individual priesthood every Church Age believer royal priesthood 1 Peter 2:9. Revelation 1:5-6 priests to his God and Father. Direct access no human mediator required.

title: Eternal Security
refs: Romans 1:20 Hebrews 1:3 Ephesians 1:13-14 John 10:28-29 Romans 5:1-2 2 Timothy 2:13 1 John 5:11-13 Genesis 1:26-27 Colossians 3:10 Hebrews 4:16 Romans 8:31-39 Romans 1:16-17 Philippians 3:12-14 Ephesians 3:20
snippet: The invisible silent foundation. Creation testifies — the immutable God who keeps the stars keeps the believer. Initiative, merit, delivery — Trinitarian character holds. Security and grace pipeline two aspects of same reality. Leave the settled issue behind. Advance.
text: Eternal security invisible silent foundation launching pad for advance. Not answer to doubt answer to stagnation. Creation testifies Romans 1:20 eternal power divine nature perceived in things made. Hebrews 1:3 upholds universe by word of his power. God who keeps stars keeps believer. Trinitarian foundation initiative Father merit Son delivery Spirit. Ephesians 1:13-14 sealed with Holy Spirit arrabOn guarantee inheritance. John 10:28-29 two hands Son and Father no one shall snatch. Security and grace pipeline two aspects same reality. One embraced by believer one channel from God. One acts in believer one acts toward believer. Romans 5:1-2 this grace in which we stand standing fixed grace flowing. 2 Timothy 2:13 if faithless He remains faithful cannot deny himself. Everlasting not eternal God alone eternal believer has beginning can be everlasting. Human spirit known eternity past arrives dead physical birth made alive salvation. 1 John 5:11-13 that you may know you have eternal life. Image of God self-consciousness volition God-consciousness basis partaking divine nature. Colossians 3:10 renewed in knowledge after image of creator. Confidence toward God Hebrews 4:16 boldness throne of grace. Courage toward humanity Romans 8:37 more than conquerors. Promised Land ten PSDs fully operational. Two movements evangellion salvation gospel living gospel doctrine. Security Egypt left behind pipeline manna wilderness Promised Land ahead. Leave settled issue behind advance.

title: Doctrinal Orientation
refs: Matthew 5:6 Proverbs 2:1-5 Hebrews 11:6 Isaiah 40:31 Romans 12:2 Isaiah 28:9-10 Colossians 1:9-10 2 Peter 1:5-8 James 1:23-25 2 Corinthians 3:18 1 Corinthians 11:31-32 Psalm 119:11 Psalm 46:1 John 17:3 Jeremiah 9:23-24 Psalm 1:1-3
snippet: The fifth problem-solving device. The personal pivot. Seek it like silver. Active participatory waiting — the exchange of strength. Gnosis to epignosis. Line upon line. The mirror left behind. All meaning, purpose, direction known because taught by God.
text: Doctrinal orientation fifth problem-solving device personal pivot. Intentional focus believer seek understand obey doctrine authority God sole provider living powerful word truth. Soul alive hungry bread of life seeks only legitimate source. Submitted renewal of mind under grace orientation. Active participatory waiting kavah exchange human strength divine. Strategic victory God the Son tactical victory every moment metabolizes doctrine. Matthew 5:6 hunger and thirst for righteousness shall be satisfied. Proverbs 2:1-5 seek it like silver search as hidden treasure. Hebrews 11:6 rewards those who seek him. Isaiah 40:31 wait on Lord exchange strength mount up eagles run not weary walk not faint. Romans 12:2 transformed renewal of mind discern will of God. Gnosis to epignosis not blind faith knowing trust. Isaiah 28:10 precept upon precept line upon line progressive layering. Colossians 1:9-10 filled with epignosis walk worthy bearing fruit increasing knowledge of God. James 1:23-25 mirror glance and forget persevere in perfect law blessed in doing. 2 Corinthians 3:18 unveiled face beholding glory transformed image degree of glory to another. Effective self-judgment confession restoration faith rest place of refuge. Psalm 119:11 stored up word in heart might not sin. Psalm 46:1 God refuge strength very present help trouble. All meaning purpose direction known taught by God. John 17:3 knowing God being known same movement eternal life. Jeremiah 9:23-24 boast in understanding and knowing God. Psalm 1:1-3 delight in law meditates day and night tree planted streams water yields fruit prospers.

title: Personal Sense of Destiny
refs: 2 Corinthians 4:6-9 Ephesians 1:4-5 Genesis 17:4-5 Genesis 32:27-28 John 1:42 Romans 9:17 Joshua 2:11-12 Ruth 1:16-17 1 Samuel 17:37 2 Samuel 7:12-16 Romans 8:28-30 Philippians 1:6 James 1:2-4 Matthew 5:14-16 2 Corinthians 4:17-18 Jeremiah 29:11
snippet: The sixth problem-solving device. The treasure in jars of clay. God does not choose the qualified — He qualifies His chosen. Name changes, unexpected vessels, David and Solomon. The destiny declared before the foundation of the world. Grow into it.
text: Personal sense of destiny sixth problem-solving device treasure jars of clay. Surpassing power belongs to God not us. Afflicted not crushed perplexed not despair struck down not destroyed. God does not choose qualified He qualifies His chosen. Destiny declared before evidence exists name given before man grown into it. Abram became Abraham father of multitude before Isaac born. Jacob became Israel at Jabbok dislocated hip failure. Simon became Peter rock before rock-like behavior. Saul became Paul apostle Gentiles on road to arrest them. Pharaoh raised up for this very purpose Romans 9:17 power proclaimed all earth. Rahab Canaanite prostitute scarlet cord genealogy of Jesus Matthew 1. Ruth Moabite widow where you go I will go followed witness into covenant genealogy. David advanced toward Goliath from epignosis lion and bear battle is Lord's. Solomon drifted seven hundred wives high places plan recovered Davidic line held. 2 Samuel 7 throne established forever not contingent on descendants faithfulness. Qualification process Romans 8:28-30 golden chain foreknown predestined called justified glorified. Philippians 1:6 he who began good work will bring to completion. James 1:2-4 testing produces steadfastness perfect complete lacking nothing. Invisible impact below threshold of conscious awareness. Matthew 5:14-16 light of world city on hill cannot be hidden. 2 Corinthians 4:17-18 light momentary affliction preparing eternal weight of glory. Jeremiah 29:11 I know the plans I have for you future and hope. Grow into it.

title: The Holy Spirit Across the Dispensations
refs: Genesis 1:1-2 Job 33:4 Psalm 104:30 Numbers 11:25 Judges 14:6 1 Samuel 16:13-14 Exodus 31:2-3 Luke 1:35 Matthew 3:16-17 Luke 4:1 Luke 4:14 Luke 4:18 John 16:7 John 7:39 Acts 2:1-4 2 Thessalonians 2:6-7 Joel 2:28-29 Acts 2:17
snippet: The third Person of the Trinity from creation to the Kingdom. Over the waters of the deep. Selective and withdrawable in the OT. Overshadowing Mary. The dove at baptism. Pentecost as the hinge. The restrainer removed. Spirit poured out on all flesh.
text: Holy Spirit across dispensations third Person Trinity creation to Kingdom. Genesis 1:2 ruach Elohim hovering over waters of deep merachephet active creative presence. Spirit at creation Job 33:4 Psalm 104:30 ongoing sustaining. Old Testament selective task-specific withdrawable. Coming upon prophets judges kings craftsmen. Numbers 11:25 Spirit rested seventy elders prophesied. Judges 14:6 Spirit rushed upon Samson. 1 Samuel 16:13-14 Spirit rushed upon David Spirit departed from Saul. Exodus 31:2-3 Bezalel filled Spirit for craftsmanship Tabernacle. Psalm 51:11 take not your Holy Spirit from me prayer Church Age believer never needs to pray. Incarnation Luke 1:35 Holy Spirit overshadowing Mary power of Most High. Bypassed male genetic line impeccable humanity no sin nature transmitted. Virgin birth pneumatological requirement for qualified substitute. Baptism Matthew 3:16-17 dove descending resting Trinity fully present publicly identified. Father speaking Son standing Spirit descending as dove. Luke 4:1 full of Holy Spirit led into wilderness. Luke 4:18 Spirit of Lord is upon me anointed to proclaim. Acts 10:38 God anointed Jesus Holy Spirit and power. Prototype life Spirit operating environment. Pentecost hinge point John 16:7 advantage I go away Helper will come. Spirit had not yet been given Jesus not yet glorified. Acts 2:1-4 mighty rushing wind tongues of fire rested on each one. Universal permanent personal. 2 Thessalonians 2:6-7 restrainer removed Rapture lawlessness released. Joel 2:28-29 Spirit poured out on all flesh sons daughters prophesy Millennium.

title: The Holy Spirit in the Church Age
refs: Philippians 2:6-8 Hebrews 4:15 1 Corinthians 6:19-20 1 Corinthians 12:13 Ephesians 1:13-14 Ephesians 4:30 1 Corinthians 12:7-11 Ephesians 5:18 John 14:16-17 Romans 8:9-11 Galatians 5:22-25
snippet: Five ministries — indwelling, baptism, sealing, gifts, filling. Hypostatic union as foundation. Jesus Christ Lord and King of the unique spiritual life since before eternity. He cut the path first and gave it to His royal family. Keep in step with the Spirit.
text: Holy Spirit Church Age five ministries unique spiritual life. Hypostatic union fully God fully man two natures one Person. Kenosis self-limitation independent exercise divine attributes. Philippians 2:6-8 emptied himself taking form servant. Hebrews 4:15 tempted in every respect yet without sin prototype life validated. Five ministries at moment of faith simultaneously sovereignly permanently. Indwelling permanent 1 Corinthians 6:19-20 body temple Holy Spirit bought with price glorify God in body. Baptism Spirit places believer into union with Christ ἐν Χριστῷ position. 1 Corinthians 12:13 all baptized into one body Jews Greeks slaves free. Sealing arrabOn guarantee inheritance Ephesians 1:13-14 sealed with Holy Spirit guarantee until acquire possession. Ephesians 4:30 do not grieve Holy Spirit sealed for day of redemption. Gifts sovereign distribution 1 Corinthians 12:7-11 to each manifestation of Spirit for common good as he wills. Romans 11:29 gifts irrevocable. Filling one revocable ministry Ephesians 5:18 be filled Spirit present passive imperative. Interrupted by sin restored by confession 1 John 1:9. Carnal not filled quenches grieves Spirit. Unique spiritual life no previous dispensation possessed. John 14:16-17 another Helper with you forever dwells with you will be in you. Romans 8:9-11 Spirit of him who raised Jesus dwells in you resurrection power. Galatians 5:22-25 fruit of Spirit keep in step with Spirit. Jesus cut path lived it first gave it royal family Pentecost. Walk it.

title: Redemption
refs: Romans 3:24 1 Corinthians 6:20 1 Corinthians 7:23 Ephesians 1:7 Romans 6:17-18 Galatians 3:13 Galatians 4:4-5 Titus 2:14 1 Peter 1:18-19 Hebrews 9:12 Revelation 5:9 Galatians 5:1 Romans 8:2
snippet: The price paid, the slave purchased, the freedom granted. Three bondages — sin, the law's curse, the cosmic system. One price — the precious blood of Christ. ἀπολύτρωσις — eternal redemption. The redeemed slave does not return to the slave market.
text: Redemption first soteriological doctrine three angles cross. Slave purchased out of bondage by ransom price blood of Christ. Three Greek words agorazō purchase in marketplace exagorazō purchased out of ἀπολύτρωσις full release by ransom price. Romans 3:24 justified through redemption in Christ Jesus. 1 Corinthians 6:20 bought with a price glorify God in body. Three bondages simultaneously addressed at cross. Bondage to sin Romans 6:17-18 slaves of sin set free having been freed become slaves of righteousness. Ephesians 1:7 redemption through his blood forgiveness of trespasses riches of grace. Bondage to law Galatians 3:13 redeemed from curse of law becoming curse for us. Galatians 4:4-5 born under law to redeem those under law adoption as sons. Bondage to cosmic system Titus 2:14 redeem from all lawlessness purify people for his own possession. 1 Peter 1:18-19 ransomed from futile ways not silver or gold but precious blood of Christ lamb without blemish. Price the blood Hebrews 9:12 entered once for all holy places by his own blood securing eternal redemption. Revelation 5:9 ransomed people for God from every tribe language people nation. Freedom Galatians 5:1 for freedom Christ set us free stand firm do not submit again to yoke of slavery. Romans 8:2 law of Spirit of life set you free in Christ Jesus from law of sin and death. Redeemed slave does not return to slave market.

title: Propitiation
refs: Romans 3:25 1 John 2:2 1 John 4:10 Hebrews 9:11-12 Hebrews 10:4 Hebrews 10:10-12 Romans 1:18 Romans 5:9 Hebrews 4:14-16 Romans 5:1-2 Hebrews 9:22 Leviticus 17:11 1 John 1:9 Romans 8:1
snippet: The satisfaction of the divine integrity — God facing the cross. ἱλαστήριον — the mercy seat. The wrath of God fully absorbed by the substitute. He sat down. The work is finished. No condemnation. Draw near with confidence.
text: Propitiation Godward transaction cross satisfaction divine integrity. Hilasterion mercy seat lid of ark of covenant blood applied God satisfied. Romans 3:25 God put forward as propitiation by his blood received by faith show God's righteousness. 1 John 2:2 propitiation for sins of whole world. 1 John 4:10 love sent Son to be propitiation. Dodd RSV contested translation expiation removes wrath removes need for substitute. Shadow and reality mercy seat Levitical sacrificial system annual Day of Atonement blood applied. Hebrews 9:11-12 entered once for all holy places by his own blood eternal redemption. Hebrews 10:10-12 he sat down Levitical priests never sat down work never finished. Christ sat down work finished no repetition no supplement. Wrath of God Romans 1:18 revealed from heaven against all ungodliness. Romans 5:9 saved from wrath of God. Satisfied God Hebrews 4:14-16 confidence draw near throne of grace. Romans 5:1-2 peace with God access into this grace. Blood of Christ Hebrews 9:22 without shedding of blood no forgiveness. Leviticus 17:11 life of flesh in blood given on altar to make atonement. Once for all ephapax he sat down. 1 John 1:9 faithful and just to forgive ground is propitiation. Romans 8:1 no condemnation for those in Christ Jesus. Advancing believer approaches propitiated God not appeasable God.

title: Reconciliation
refs: 2 Corinthians 5:18-19 Romans 5:10-11 Ephesians 2:14-16 Colossians 1:21-22 Romans 5:1 Isaiah 53:5 Colossians 1:19-20 Romans 8:19-21 2 Corinthians 5:20 1 Peter 2:9 Romans 3:24-25 Colossians 2:13-15
snippet: The barrier removed — the enmity ended — the relationship restored. While we were enemies God reconciled us. The dividing wall demolished. Peace with God. The ambassador function grounded. Three doctrines, one cross. Draw near. Advance. Proclaim.
text: Reconciliation relational transaction cross barrier removed enmity ended relationship restored. katallagē exchange changing one state for another. Katallassō restore broken relationship by removing cause of breach. God reconciles world to himself not himself to world enmity on human side removal divine act. 2 Corinthians 5:18-19 God through Christ reconciled us to himself ministry of reconciliation not counting trespasses against them. Romans 5:10-11 while enemies reconciled by death of Son much more saved by his life. Barrier structural consequence fall spiritual death sin nature condemnation divine integrity cannot coexist with unrighteousness. Ephesians 2:14-16 broken down dividing wall of hostility killing the hostility one new man making peace. Colossians 1:21-22 alienated hostile in mind reconciled in body of flesh by death present holy blameless above reproach. Peace with God Romans 5:1 eirēnēn echomen pros ton theon. Isaiah 53:5 chastisement that brought us peace. Cosmic scope Colossians 1:19-20 all things whether on earth or in heaven making peace by blood of his cross. Romans 8:19-21 creation waits eager longing set free from bondage to corruption. Ambassador function 2 Corinthians 5:20 ambassadors for Christ God making appeal through us be reconciled to God. 1 Peter 2:9 royal priesthood proclaim excellencies called out of darkness into marvelous light. Three doctrines one cross redemption slave purchased propitiation integrity satisfied reconciliation relationship restored. Romans 3:24-25 Colossians 2:13-15 all three visible. Draw near advance proclaim.
